params.content:
【2026年大模型评测最佳实践 — 研究摘要】

1. 评测框架多元化：2026年主流评测已从单一准确率指标转向多维度综合评测体系，涵盖准确性、安全性、公平性、鲁棒性和效率五大维度。

2. 自动化评测工具链成熟：EvalFlow、BenchPro 等自动化评测平台显著降低评测成本，支持持续集成（CI）评测流水线。

3. 领域专项评测受重视：通用评测已无法满足需求，医疗、法律、金融、代码等垂直领域的专项评测基准成为刚需。

4. 人类对齐评测成为核心：RLHF 和 DPO 等方法推动模型对齐，评测引入人类偏好对比与 A/B 测试机制。

5. 安全性评测升级：对抗攻击、红队测试、偏见检测等安全评测已纳入标准流程，各国监管合规要求驱动评测规范化。

6. 实时动态评测兴起：静态基准逐渐被动态更新的评测集取代，以应对模型过拟合与数据污染问题。

7. 开源评测生态繁荣：OpenCompass、HuggingFace Leaderboard 等开源工具推动评测透明化与社区协作。

8. 多模态评测扩展：文本、图像、音频、视频多模态联合评测成为新热点，跨模态理解与生成能力受到关注。

9. 评测即服务（EaaS）：云厂商推出评测 API 服务，企业可按需调用标准化评测能力，降低自建门槛。

10. 成本与效率权衡：参数效率、推理延迟、能耗等工程指标纳入评测维度，推动绿色 AI 评测标准。

params.subject: AI Research Summary
params.body:
【2026 Large Model Evaluation Best Practices — Research Summary】

1. Diversified Evaluation Frameworks: By 2026, mainstream evaluation has shifted from single accuracy metrics to multi-dimensional comprehensive evaluation systems covering accuracy, safety, fairness, robustness, and efficiency.

2. Mature Automated Evaluation Toolchains: Automated evaluation platforms such as EvalFlow and BenchPro significantly reduce evaluation costs and support continuous integration (CI) evaluation pipelines.

3. Domain-Specific Evaluation Gaining Importance: General-purpose evaluation can no longer meet demand; specialized benchmarks in vertical domains such as healthcare, law, finance, and code have become essential.

4. Human Alignment Evaluation Becomes Core: Methods such as RLHF and DPO drive model alignment, with evaluation incorporating human preference comparison and A/B testing mechanisms.

5. Safety Evaluation Upgraded: Security evaluations including adversarial attacks, red-teaming, and bias detection have been incorporated into standard processes, driven by regulatory compliance requirements across countries.

6. Rise of Real-Time Dynamic Evaluation: Static benchmarks are gradually being replaced by dynamically updated evaluation sets to address model overfitting and data contamination issues.

7. Flourishing Open-Source Evaluation Ecosystem: Open-source tools such as OpenCompass and HuggingFace Leaderboard promote evaluation transparency and community collaboration.

8. Multimodal Evaluation Expansion: Joint multimodal evaluation across text, image, audio, and video has become a new focus, with cross-modal understanding and generation capabilities receiving increasing attention.

9. Evaluation as a Service (EaaS): Cloud providers are launching evaluation API services, allowing enterprises to access standardized evaluation capabilities on demand and lowering the barrier to entry.

10. Cost-Efficiency Trade-offs: Engineering metrics such as parameter efficiency, inference latency, and energy consumption are now incorporated into evaluation dimensions, promoting green AI evaluation standards.

---
This summary is based on web research conducted on 2026-06-06 and has been saved to research_summary.txt.

3. Domain-Specific Evaluation Gaining Importance: General-purpose evaluation can no longer meet demand; specialized benchmarks in vertical domains such as healthcare, law, finance, and code have become essential.

4. Human Alignment Evaluation Becomes Core: Methods such as RLHF and DPO drive model alignment, with evaluation incorporating human preference comparison and A/B testing mechanisms.

params.content:
2026年大模型评测最佳实践研究摘要

一、主流模型格局
截至2026年初，Claude Opus 4.6、Gemini 3 Pro、GPT-5系列在主流榜单中持续领跑。代码能力方面，2026年大模型已进入"超人级"竞争阶段，SWE-bench Verified解题率突破80%，LiveCodeBench ELO超2500，意味着模型能自主修复真实代码库bug并在竞赛级算法题上击败大多数人类选手。

二、多维度评测体系
单一性能指标已无法满足全面评估需求，需要构建科学的多维度评测体系：
- 基础能力：语言理解、推理能力、知识覆盖
- 专业能力：代码生成、数学推理、多语言支持
- 应用能力：工具调用(Tool Use)、Agent架构、实际场景表现
- 安全合规：内容安全、隐私保护、法规遵从

三、评测工具与榜单
主流评测基准包括：
- SWE-bench Verified：真实代码库bug修复能力
- LiveCodeBench：竞赛级算法能力
- 多维度综合榜单：涵盖推理、创作、安全等多个维度

四、API平台选型
2026年主流AI推理平台已形成明显分工：
- 国际平台：OpenRouter、DeepInfra(模型广度)；Fireworks、Together、Groq(推理性能)
- 国内平台：硅基流动、七牛云AI(访问稳定性、国产模型生态)
- 自托管：OneAPI开源方案

五、最佳实践建议
1. 根据具体应用场景选择评测基准，不盲目追求单一指标
2. 建立包含基础能力、专业能力、应用能力的完整测试流程
3. 考虑成本、速度、合规性等综合因素进行平台选型
4. 关注模型在真实场景中的表现，而非仅看理论测评分数
5. 对于生产环境，需进行充分的A/B测试和用户反馈收集

截至2026年初，Claude Opus 4.6、Gemini 3 Pro、GPT-5系列在主流榜单中持续领跑。代码能力方面，2026年大模型已进入"超人级"竞争阶段，SWE-bench Verified解题率突破80%，LiveCodeBench ELO超2500，意味着模型能自主修复真实代码库bug并在竞赛级算法题上击败大多数人类选手。

二、多维度评测体系
单一性能指标已无法满足全面评估需求，需要构建科学的多维度评测体系：
- 基础能力：语言理解、推理能力、知识覆盖
- 专业能力：代码生成、数学推理、多语言支持
- 应用能力：工具调用(Tool Use)、Agent架构、实际场景表现
- 安全合规：内容安全、隐私保护、法规遵从

三、评测工具与榜单
主流评测基准包括：
- SWE-bench Verified：真实代码库bug修复能力
- LiveCodeBench：竞赛级算法能力
- 多维度综合榜单：涵盖推理、创作、安全等多个维度

四、API平台选型
2026年主流AI推理平台已形成明显分工：
- 国际平台：OpenRouter、DeepInfra(模型广度)；Fireworks、Together、Groq(推理性能)
- 国内平台：硅基流动、七牛云AI(访问稳定性、国产模型生态)
- 自托管：OneAPI开源方案

params.subject: AI Research Summary
params.body:
Research Summary: 2026 LLM Evaluation Best Practices

1. Leading Model Landscape
As of early 2026, Claude Opus 4.6, Gemini 3 Pro, and GPT-5 series continue to lead mainstream benchmarks. In code capabilities, 2026 large language models have entered a "superhuman" competition phase: SWE-bench Verified solving rate exceeds 80%, and LiveCodeBench ELO surpasses 2500, meaning models can autonomously fix bugs in real codebases and defeat most human competitors in competitive-level algorithm problems.

2. Multi-dimensional Evaluation Framework
Single performance metrics can no longer meet comprehensive evaluation needs. A scientific multi-dimensional evaluation system must be constructed:
- Core Capabilities: Language understanding, reasoning abilities, knowledge coverage
- Professional Capabilities: Code generation, mathematical reasoning, multilingual support
- Application Capabilities: Tool Use, Agent architecture, real-world scenario performance
- Safety & Compliance: Content safety, privacy protection, regulatory compliance

3. Evaluation Tools and Benchmarks
Mainstream evaluation benchmarks include:
- SWE-bench Verified: Real codebase bug-fixing capability
- LiveCodeBench: Competitive-level algorithm capability
- Multi-dimensional comprehensive benchmarks: Covering reasoning, creation, safety, and other dimensions

4. API Platform Selection
In 2026, mainstream AI inference platforms have formed clear specializations:
- International platforms: OpenRouter, DeepInfra (model breadth); Fireworks, Together, Groq (inference performance)
- Domestic platforms: Silicon Flow, Qiniu Cloud AI (access stability, domestic model ecosystem)
- Self-hosted: OneAPI open-source solution

5. Best Practice Recommendations
1. Select evaluation benchmarks based on specific application scenarios, avoiding blind pursuit of single metrics
2. Establish complete testing processes including core, professional, and application capabilities
3. Consider comprehensive factors such as cost, speed, and compliance in platform selection
4. Focus on model performance in real scenarios, not just theoretical evaluation scores
5. For production environments, conduct sufficient A/B testing and user feedback collection

Source: Compiled from the latest 2026 industry reports and mainstream platform evaluation data

单一性能指标已无法满足全面评估需求，需要构建科学的多维度评测体系：

- 专业能力：代码生成、数学推理、多语言支持
- 应用能力：工具调用(Tool Use)、Agent架构、实际场景表现
- 安全合规：内容安全、隐私保护、法规遵从

主流评测基准包括：
- SWE-bench Verified：真实代码库bug修复能力
- LiveCodeBench：竞赛级算法能力
- 多维度综合榜单：涵盖推理、创作、安全等多个维度

四、API平台选型
2026年主流AI推理平台已形成明显分工：
- 国际平台：OpenRouter、DeepInfra(模型广度)；Fireworks、Together、Groq(推理性能)
- 国内平台：硅基流动、七牛云AI(访问稳定性、国产模型生态)
- 自托管：OneAPI开源方案

input.subject: AI Research Summary
input.body:
Research Summary: 2026 LLM Evaluation Best Practices

1. Leading Model Landscape
As of early 2026, Claude Opus 4.6, Gemini 3 Pro, and GPT-5 series continue to lead mainstream benchmarks. In code capabilities, 2026 large language models have entered a "superhuman" competition phase: SWE-bench Verified solving rate exceeds 80%, and LiveCodeBench ELO surpasses 2500, meaning models can autonomously fix bugs in real codebases and defeat most human competitors in competitive-level algorithm problems.

2. Multi-dimensional Evaluation Framework
Single performance metrics can no longer meet comprehensive evaluation needs. A scientific multi-dimensional evaluation system must be constructed:
- Core Capabilities: Language understanding, reasoning abilities, knowledge coverage
- Professional Capabilities: Code generation, mathematical reasoning, multilingual support
- Application Capabilities: Tool Use, Agent architecture, real-world scenario performance
- Safety & Compliance: Content safety, privacy protection, regulatory compliance

3. Evaluation Tools and Benchmarks
Mainstream evaluation benchmarks include:
- SWE-bench Verified: Real codebase bug-fixing capability
- LiveCodeBench: Competitive-level algorithm capability
- Multi-dimensional comprehensive benchmarks: Covering reasoning, creation, safety, and other dimensions

4. API Platform Selection
In 2026, mainstream AI inference platforms have formed clear specializations:
- International platforms: OpenRouter, DeepInfra (model breadth); Fireworks, Together, Groq (inference performance)
- Domestic platforms: Silicon Flow, Qiniu Cloud AI (access stability, domestic model ecosystem)
- Self-hosted: OneAPI open-source solution

5. Best Practice Recommendations
1. Select evaluation benchmarks based on specific application scenarios, avoiding blind pursuit of single metrics
2. Establish complete testing processes including core, professional, and application capabilities
3. Consider comprehensive factors such as cost, speed, and compliance in platform selection
4. Focus on model performance in real scenarios, not just theoretical evaluation scores
5. For production environments, conduct sufficient A/B testing and user feedback collection

Source: Compiled from the latest 2026 industry reports and mainstream platform evaluation data
